headline: GLW Gains From Strength in Specialty Materials: Will it Sustain?
summary: GLW sees Specialty Materials growth as Gorilla Glass demand in smartphones and devices lifts sales and profit. Can new innovations like Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3 sustain momentum?

headline: HP Inc. Stock: Is HPQ Underperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: HP Inc. has lagged the broader technology sector over the past year, and analysts currently maintain a cautiously bearish outlook on the stock’s near-term prospects.
